wordplay_note: A fisher of truth in a moralistic dystopia
card_description: Ann Fisher (meaning "Fisher = fisherman") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Man Who Japed*. Wife of Allen Purcell in the hyper-moralistic society. Name note: A fisher of truth in a moralistic dystopia. Domestic anchor in a world of enforced virtue. First appears in *The Man Who Japed*.

reference.brief: Wife of Allen Purcell in the hyper-moralistic society
reference.significance: Domestic anchor in a world of enforced virtue
